block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Meta Stock jumps despite earnings results missing. The company's revenue and profit beat expectations, driving up shares. The strong Q4 performance and optimistic outlook for 2023 also boost investor confidence. The share price rose sharply by 27% immediately after the report was released on February 1st.
block_07: The company wins dismissal of insider trading lawsuit. A US judge ruled that the plaintiffs failed to prove that Coinbase employees used non-public information to trade cryptocurrencies. The share price has risen 51% this week.
block_10: Alibaba's stock sinks in the market, falling 5% after China's new regulations on tech firms. However, analysts will be looking for positivity from Alibaba as it approaches its next earnings report date. In total, the company's stock is down by almost 10% this week.
